since_last: 61% of 101 AI names green; AI Applications & Data Software leads +2.19%; AI bubble risk 50 Heating Up.

cards.headline: The tape: a broad bid, 61% of AI names green
cards.body: SPX -0.14% · BTC -0.57% · Gold -1.26% · Nasdaq100 -0.54%. 61% of 101 AI names are green — a broad bid. AI Applications & Data Software is doing the heavy lifting at +2.19%.

cards.headline: AI Applications & Data Software leads, AI Platforms, Internet & AdTech lags
cards.body: Strongest AI sector is AI Applications & Data Software at +2.19%; weakest is AI Platforms, Internet & AdTech at -0.52%. Rotation within the AI trade, not a one-way move.

cards.headline: NOW is the standout at +7.29%
cards.body: Leaders: NOW +7.29%, SKHY +7.17%, PUBM +4.98%, WDAY +3.38%, MU +3.08%. Laggards: TSLA -5.98%, GOOGL -4.22%, NXPI -3.16%, AMZN -2.01%.
cards.watch: Hot means attention, not direction — watch whether the leaders hold the bid or fade into the next session.

cards.headline: SpaceX (SPCX) +1.00% at $116.41
cards.body: The SpaceX debut keeps pulling attention — SPCX is +1.00% this session. The biggest IPO in history remains the tape's attention magnet.

cards.headline: Risk: AI bubble index 50 — Heating Up
cards.body: The composite AI Bubble Index sits at 50/100, led by Valuation at 85. Higher = frothier; the risk is everyone caring at once while valuations are already stretched.
